function.rulebook_notes: Resolved the target via canonical cast record first, extracted alias identifier `badger`, searched project metadata by identifier, and read all matched canonical project README.MD records.
function.outcome_justification: The canonical entity record 10_entities/cast/badger.md identifies the 3D printer alias as `badger`. The four project README.MD files listed in grounding_refs each explicitly link `entity.badger`, and their titles provide the exact project names returned, sorted alphabetically.
